name: Hawaii Pharmacy Technician Registration
description: Already licensed as a pharmacy technician? Here's whether your license transfers to Hawaii - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: Hawaii Board of Pharmacy
provider.parentOrganization: Hawaii Department of Health (DOH) Office of Health Care Assurance

address.description: Department of Commerce and Consumer Affairs, PVL Licensing Branch, P. O. Box 3469, Honolulu, HI 96801

requiredDocuments.name: Official Transcripts
requiredDocuments.description: Sent directly from your educational institution.

requiredDocuments.name: Exam Score Report
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does a Hawaii pharmacy technician license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around $100 to $200. Check the specific fee breakdown above.
Yes, passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

mainEntity.name: Does Hawaii have reciprocity for pharmacy technicians?

acceptedAnswer.text: No interstate compact currently covers pharmacy technician practice in Hawaii. To work in Hawaii, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my pharmacy technician license to Hawaii?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Hawaii while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
